title: To Reformers in Despair
content:
'Tis not too late to build our young land right,
        Cleaner than Holland, courtlier than Japan,
        Devout like early Rome, with hearths like hers,
        Hearths that will recreate the breed called man.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Vachel Lindsay, titled "To Reformers in Despair", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
